channel.title: Whitepaper on memduh
channel.description: Recent content in Whitepaper on memduh

item.title: Ethereum: A Next-Generation Smart Contract and Decentralized Application Platform
item.description:
The Ethereum whitepaper introducing smart contracts and the EVM.

Author: Vitalik Buterin
Year: 2014

item.title: Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
item.description:
The original Bitcoin whitepaper that introduced blockchain technology and proof-of-work consensus.

Author: Satoshi Nakamoto
Year: 2008
